rawText:
Re: Re: Re: Q3 roadmap sync — hi team sorry for the wall of text but wanted to loop everyone in before thursday. ACTION ITEM (buried lol): please review the attached deck v7_FINAL_revised(2).pptx and leave comments on slides 14-18 re: the API deprecation timeline. also @jerome can you confirm whether we're still targeting oct 15 for the shadow inbox beta? legal needs an answer by EOD wednesday. thx!!

--
Sarah Chen | PM, Platform
Sent from my iPhone
random but does anyone know why staging is slow today??
@jerome hey when you get a sec can you review PR #847? it's the notification batching refactor — blocking the release train. no rush but also kinda urgent 😅
**ServerMod**: Reminder that Expo SDK 56 migration office hours are today at 2pm PT in #help. Bring your app.json questions!
yo saw your shadow inbox concept on twitter — are you open sourcing the triage layer? would love to collab on a plugin for Linear
Dad's flight lands 4:45 at SFO terminal 2. Can u pick him up or should I call an uber? Also did u remember to sign the insurance form I emailed??
🗳️ POLL: Trash pickup moved to FRIDAY this week due to holiday. React with 👍 if you can take bins out Thursday night.
Your Stripe verification code is 482913. This code expires in 10 minutes. If you didn't request this, ignore this email.
dropped the dark mode mocks in figma — no action needed unless you hate them lol. link: https://figma.com/file/shadow-inbox-v2

Updated invitation: Weekly 1:1 with Alex @ Wed Jun 25, 2026 10am–10:30am (PDT)

This event has been moved from 9am.

Going? Yes | No | Maybe
Your WhatsApp account is being registered on a new device. Your verification code: 739201. Do not share this code.
Open Enrollment ends Friday 6/27. You have not completed your elections. ACTION REQUIRED: Log in to Workday and select your 2026 medical plan. Failure to enroll will default you to the HDHP plan.
whoever left oat milk in the fridge with ONE sip left… we need to talk
btw your last commit broke my local build — `triageService.ts` import path? might just be me but lmk
Amazon: Your package with USB-C hub will arrive today by 8pm. Track: https://a.co/d/abc123 Reply STOP to opt out
